profile.settings_description: Update your personal information and security settings.

theme.title: Color Theme
theme.description: Select the primary system color. This will affect buttons, links, and other highlighted elements.
theme.success_message: The system color has been updated successfully.

information.emailUnverified: Your email address is not verified. Verify it to access all features.
information.verificationSent: A new verification link has been sent to your email address.
information.bioPlaceholder: Tell us a bit about yourself...

password.title: Update Password
password.description: Keep your account secure with a strong password
password.successMessage: Your account security has been enhanced.

delete.title: Delete Account
delete.description: Permanently remove your account and data
delete.warningMessage: Once your account is deleted, all of its resources and data will be permanently deleted. Before deleting your account download any data or information that you wish to retain.
delete.confirmTitle: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
delete.confirmMessage: Enter your password to confirm you would like to permanently delete your account.

ai.title: Personal AI Configuration
ai.description: Configure your own API keys to enable personalized intelligent features.
ai.hint: If you configure a provider here, the system will use your personal key instead of the system default. This gives you more control over usage and capabilities.

onboarding.title: Onboarding
onboarding.description: Manage your onboarding experience and guided tour
onboarding.confirmMessage: This will reset your onboarding progress and restart the guided tour. Your account data and settings will not be affected.
onboarding.infoPoint1: Your onboarding progress will be reset
onboarding.infoPoint2: The guided tour will restart from the beginning
onboarding.infoPoint3: Your account data and settings remain unchanged
onboarding.restartHint: Review the platform features and setup process again

profile.avatar_remove_error: An error occurred while removing the avatar
profile.avatar_requirements: Maximum 2MB. Formats: JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP
profile.avatar_too_large: The image is too large. Maximum 2MB
profile.avatar_upload_error: An error occurred while uploading the photo

notifications.title: Notification Preferences
notifications.description: Configure how you want to be notified about upload and processing completions
notifications.browser_description: Show system notifications even when the app is in the background
notifications.permission_denied_help: Permission denied. Please enable notifications in your browser settings.
notifications.info_description: Notifications help you stay informed about long-running operations. You can customize which types of notifications you receive and how they are delivered.

profile.invalid_file_type: Only image files are allowed (JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP, SVG)
